div.b: UCP 2026-04-08 + AP2 — One Purchase, End to End (Sequence)
div.font: Vertical lifelines = the running services. Each message is labeled by the protocol it uses. ① ② ③ mark the three spend-policy enforcement gates.

div.div:
Other protocol surfaces (not on this happy path):
• OAuth 2.0 Identity Linking — Agent ↔ Merchant /oauth/* (RFC 8414 + PKCE), scope order:read · REST
• 3-DS escalation — PSP returns continue_url; User completes the step-up in the browser · REST
• Approval inbox — autonomy-blocked buys wait for the User's decision in Walletly · REST

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
